shape_decode: cmp,vp,vpc,naive = W,_,W,L  -> cmplog and value_profile_cmplog RESOLVE, naive BLOCKS, value_profile NON-DECISIVE. Pure i2s-pro family: I2S (input-to-state literal substitution) is the resolving technique; value-profile gradient adds nothing decisive.

hypotheses.label: I2S enriches the cmplog corpus with the exact CMP-target byte(s) at the gate offset (literal substitution), which naive's blind havoc cannot place

params.gate_target_value: per-branch W (CMP-target) byte(s) at the fixed gate offset
params.gate_decoy_value: per-branch L (loser-occupying) byte(s) at the same offset

hypotheses.prediction: signed_target_enrich > 0: the cmplog corpus is log2-enriched (vs naive) for the exact target byte value at the fixed gate offset. This is DISCRIMINATING because an i2s-pro literal-substitution mechanism deterministically plants the CMP operand at that offset, so its corpus concentrates on the target value; a NON-i2s explanation (e.g. naive happens to reach it by coverage gradient, or the gate is not actually an I2S value gate) would predict signed_target_enrich ~ 0 (no cmplog-over-naive concentration). G2-independent: enrichment is measured on the saved CORPUS bytes at the gate offset, not on which fuzzer resolved -- the resolve pattern (vpc/cmplog vs naive) does not enter the metric.

notes.merges: The prior v2 Pass-B split this shape into THREE clusters: (1) i2s_exact_literal_substitution [single-operand fixed-offset value gate], (2) i2s_correlated_multifield_header [bloaty section_count / vm-range, multiple interdependent header dwords], (3) i2s_structural_grammar_assembly [PNG chunk-stream / XML namespace oldNs / IPv6 fragment reassembly / font table layout]. The unifying mechanism across all 35 is IDENTICAL at the technique level: I2SRandReplace reads a logged CMP operand and substitutes it at the matching input offset; the v2 clusters differ only in HOW MANY offsets and whether the gated scalar is a single field vs a derived/structural value. Real campaign data can DISCRIMINATE only the single-offset value-gate subtype (operand_enrichment scores one fixed offset with byte-aligned W/L seeds). Clusters (2) and (3) are NOT separately discriminable from (1) by any built tool -- they would require struct_size_ratio / value_distance_reached / multi-offset enrichment that no current tool provides for these targets -- so I do NOT keep them as distinct testable hypotheses. They collapse into 'I2S literal substitution' conceptually but are carried by the inconclusive fallback for measurement, per the honest 'no clean test' rule.
notes.targets_present: All 10 targets appear (bloaty, lcms, libpng, libxml2, openthread, curl, harfbuzz, sqlite3). data_realities: on-disk corpora exist ONLY for curl, harfbuzz, openthread, sqlite3. Therefore operand_enrichment can score AT MOST those four targets; bloaty/lcms/libpng/libxml2 branches (28 of 35) have no on-disk corpus and are unscorable by ANY corpus/seed tool -> inconclusive.
notes.data_reality_byte_alignment: data_realities forbid byte_freq_ratio on different-SIZED winning vs blocking seeds (structural-assembly gates). On corpus targets this rules OUT: harfbuzz_5334 (sfnt header + table-tag assembly, dispersed_multibyte, W/L different size), sqlite3_14549 (expression-tree structural sub-case, byte_signature 'unclear', operator-token structure not a fixed offset), openthread_13311/13335 (fragment-reassembly structural assembly, dispersed magic runs across many offsets, W/L different size: cmplog winners ~57B vs naive losers ~296B per the cards), and openthread_13313 (relational CHECKSUM equality -- the target value is computed from other header bytes, not a fixed literal at a fixed offset, so target_vs_decoy at one offset is ill-defined). These 5 corpus-target branches go to inconclusive.
notes.scorable_set: Only 8 branches survive to the testable hypothesis: curl_405 (file:// contiguous literal at 0x06) and openthread_13320/13321/13326/13333 (single-byte protocol switch constants 0x2c/0x3a), 13390 (single-byte context-ID), 13389 (2-byte Server16 -- still a fixed-offset contiguous literal the CMP logs), 13337 (16-byte unicast destination address, contiguous_literal at a fixed header offset). openthread_13337's W/L seeds ARE similar-sized coherent IPv6 headers per the card so byte-alignment holds; if operand_enrichment returns no_gate_signature for it (length/structural skip), the arbiter lets it fall to inconclusive. The remaining 27 branches (all non-corpus targets + the 5 structural/relational corpus branches above) carry no discriminable measurement and are labelled by the deterministic shape-decode label-source only at the orchestrator level; this evidence test does not independently confirm them.
notes.tool_caveats: operand_enrichment (validated, pro median +3.12 / anti -0.55, 88% separation) is the ONLY built tool that fits; threshold 1.0 is conservative relative to its validated pro median to keep the rule robust to the smaller openthread per-byte operands. scope_limits: it returns no_gate_signature on structural/length gates and needs >=3 W and >=3 L seeds in db/blockers.sqlite -- the 286 reps have seeds, but any scorable branch lacking >=3/>=3 falls to inconclusive automatically. No NEW descriptor is proposed: every discriminable hypothesis in this shape is a fixed-offset i2s value gate that operand_enrichment already covers; proposing a struct_size/value_distance descriptor for the structural subtypes would be untestable on these non-corpus targets and so is deliberately omitted.
